localized title: Back to the Future Part II
plot outline: Marty McFly has only just gotten back from the past, when he is once again picked up by Dr. Emmett Brown and sent through time to the future. Marty's job in the future is to pose as his own son to prevent him from being thrown in prison. Unfortunately, things get worse when the future changes the present.
title: Back to the Future Part II
original title: Back to the Future Part II
akas: Back to the Future: Part II (Japan, English title)
